zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena Ellen de Workesley於1334年之前出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths40歲，母親Cicely Bromhall12歲。她於1349年與Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena Ellen de Workesley于1334年之前出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，她的父亲Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths40岁，母亲Cicely Bromhall12岁。她于1349年与Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena Ellen de Workesley was born before 1334, in Barton, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths, was 40 and her mother, Cicely Bromhall, was 12. She married Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton in 1349, in Preston, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1400, in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena Ellen de Workesley est née avant 1334, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Cicely Bromhall, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton en 1349, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena Ellen de Workesley vor 1334 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths 40 und ihre Mutter Cicely Bromhall 12. Sie hat 1349 in Preston, Lancashire, England Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1400 in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Ellen de Workesley è nata il prima del 1334 nel Barton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Cicely Bromhall, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton nel 1349, nel Preston, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1400, nel Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena Ellen de Workesleyが1334年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Robert de Worsley Lord of Boothsは40歳，母Cicely Bromhallは12歳であった。1349年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでSir Thomas Booth Of Bartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena Ellen de Workesley(이)가 1334년 이전 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Bromhall(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 랭카실르 플레스턴에서 Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Ellen de Workesley nasceu antes 1334, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Bromhall, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton em 1349, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena Ellen de Workesley родилась перед 1334 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely Bromhall, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton в 1349 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena Ellen de Workesley nació antes de 1334, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Cicely Bromhall, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton en 1349, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1400, en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
